name: sysCreateVariableFilter
title: sysCreateVariableFilter
syntax: long sysCreateVariableFilter(long filterType, char filterName[]); // form 2
description: Creates a new variable filter behind the node calling the function. If no filterName is given, the default filter with an empty name is created.

parameters.name: filterType
parameters.description: Specifies the filter behavior: 0: Stop Filter. Stops all variables that are added to it. 1: Pass Filter. Stops all variables that are not added to it.

parameters.name: Note An empty filterName refers to the default filter and can be omitted completely.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
